metadata.job_summary: Clarksons is recruiting for its flagship 2026 Global Trainee Broker Programme based in Aberdeen. The two-year fixed-term programme provides structured rotations through different broking divisions, on-the-job learning with industry experts, and exposure to maritime, shipping, offshore, trade and energy markets. Year one includes induction in London followed by market rotations; year two offers specialization in a chosen division with potential for international secondment.

research.company_mission: Enable smarter, cleaner global trade and create sustainable, positive change through market-leading technology and innovative solutions
research.recent_news: Zuma Labs acquisition (Jan 2026) for FFA trading technology; expanded digital market intelligence; growing offshore renewables broking presence; Aberdeen office is strategic hub for global operations

resume.introduction: Market analyst with cross-border transaction experience. Moving into shipping and trade broking to develop sector expertise. Available from May 2026.
auraia_bullets: Managed client relationships and coordinated with multiple stakeholders across Europe, US, and Asia throughout 7 transactions, gaining exposure to global markets and international deal complexity
Executed financial analysis and market evaluation, producing tailored analytical deliverables and maintaining structured databases under competing deadlines
Built financial models and delivered analytical insights to senior decision-makers, translating complex market data into actionable recommendations
Coordinated multi-stakeholder processes from initial engagement through completion, demonstrating ability to navigate complex commercial negotiations and market dynamics
rc_bullets: Conducted market analysis on opportunities, developing evaluation frameworks and projections across sectors
Worked with senior leadership on strategic opportunities, providing market assessment and competitive positioning
Screened 500+ potential opportunities and contributed to evaluation and selection of high-value targets for acquisition
generali_bullets: Supported financial and strategic projects for global operations spanning multiple business units
Built automated tools to track key performance indicators and conducted variance analysis on financial performance
Prepared strategic presentations for senior management and board-level meetings on business performance and market outlook

extra_entries.title: McKinsey x Keyrock Business Case Finalist
extra_entries.sentence: Developed a quantitative model to forecast market events using statistical analysis and order book data

extra_entries.title: Personal Investment Portfolio Manager
extra_entries.sentence: Manages a diversified portfolio using sophisticated strategies, achieving +8% annualized returns through market analysis

extra_entries.title: Founder & Developer, Screeny.ai
extra_entries.sentence: Built an AI-driven analytical tool for identifying strategic opportunities, adopted by 3 firms for decision support

extra_entries.title: Founder, Second-Hand Luxury Business
extra_entries.sentence: Founded and managed a venture with a 2-person team, achieved profitability within 6 months, executed 100+ transactions

resume.coursework: Investments, Derivatives, Quantitative Asset and Risk Management, Corporate Finance
resume.tools: Excel (advanced), Python, SQL, VBA, PowerBI, Bloomberg Terminal, ChatGPT
resume.skills: Market Analysis, Financial Modeling, Client Management, Opportunity Evaluation
resume.interests: Global shipping, Energy transition, Applied analytics in trading

cover_letter.paragraph_1: Clarksons' mission to enable smarter, cleaner global trade through market-leading expertise and digital innovation stands at the intersection of my professional interests and career ambitions. The January 2026 acquisition of Zuma Labs exemplifies your commitment to advancing broking through technology, while your expanding presence in offshore renewables reflects the energy transition shaping global shipping. The 2026 Trainee Broker Programme's structured rotations through different broking divisions offer precisely the breadth of exposure needed to build deep expertise in shipping, offshore, and trade markets while contributing meaningfully to Clarksons' global operations.
cover_letter.paragraph_2: Over two years as an analyst in a Geneva-based advisory firm, I have developed core competencies directly applicable to broking: managing complex client relationships across multiple time zones, conducting rigorous market analysis and opportunity evaluation, and coordinating multi-stakeholder processes under time pressure. My experience screening and analyzing over 500 potential opportunities honed my ability to synthesize market data, identify value drivers, and communicate insights to senior decision-makers. This foundation in analytical rigor and client management has prepared me to succeed in Clarksons' fast-paced broking environment.
cover_letter.paragraph_3: With a Master's degree in Finance and fluency in English, French, Spanish, and German, I bring both the quantitative foundation and cross-cultural capability required to thrive in Clarksons' global network. My intellectual curiosity about global shipping markets, demonstrated through independent analysis and quantitative modeling, aligns with your emphasis on continuous learning and market expertise. The opportunity to rotate through different divisions under expert mentorship while building long-term broking expertise makes this programme the ideal next step in my career.
cover_letter.closing: I would welcome the opportunity to discuss my application further.

email.subject: Application - Trainee Broker Programme - Adrian Turion
email.body:
Dear Recruitment Team,

Please find attached my resume and cover letter for the 2026 Global Trainee Broker Programme (Aberdeen) at Clarksons.

With a background in market analysis, opportunity evaluation, and cross-functional client management, I am excited by the opportunity to develop broking expertise through your structured rotation programme. My analytical skills and interest in global shipping and energy markets align well with Clarksons' operations and growth strategy.

I am available to start the programme and committed to contributing to Clarksons' reputation for excellence from day one.

Best regards,
Adrian Turion
+41 77 262 37 96
